name: Surf
desc: A water spell that deals damage and knockback in a large area.

name: Surf2
desc: A water spell that deals more damage and knockback in a larger area.

name: Bolt
desc: A lightning bolt that has a 25% chance to Stun.

name: Bolt2
desc: A stronger lightning bolt that has a 50% chance to Stun.

name: Fire Blast
desc: A fireblast that inflicts Burn 2 in an area.

name: Fireball2
desc: A more damaging fireblast that inflicts Burn 3 in an area.

name: Frost Blast
desc: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes the first unit it hits.

name: FreezeRay2
desc: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes every unit it hits.

name: Energy Blast
desc: A high damage spell that hits a single target.

name: Blast2
desc: A high damage spell that hits a single target and deals extra damage equal to your [img:int].

name: Magic Missile
desc: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.

name: MagicMissile2
desc: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss. Emit 3 Sparkles.

name: Wall of Fire
desc: A fire spell that inflicts Burn 1 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.

name: WallOfFire2
desc: A fire spell that damages, inflicts Burn 3 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.

name: Hyper Beam
desc:
Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: HyperBeam2
desc: Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.

name: Meteor Storm
desc: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a large area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

name: MeteorStorm2
desc: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a larger area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

name: Mega Blast
desc: Deal high damage in a cone.

name: MegaBlast2
desc: Deal high damage in a larger cone.

name: Chill
desc: Inflict Slow on a unit.

name: Slow2
desc: Inflict Slow on units in an area.

name: Enlarge
desc: Get big.

name: Enlarge2
desc: Get big.

name: Wind Slash
desc: A wind spell that hits an entire line with Knockback 1.

name: WindSlash2
desc: A wind spell that hits a wide line with Knockback 2.

name: Warp
desc: Teleport diagonally any distance.

name: Warp2
desc:
Teleport diagonally any distance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Teleport
desc: Teleport to any tile.

name: MageTeleport2
desc:
Teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Switch
desc: Switch positions with any unit.

name: MageSwap2
desc:
Switch positions with any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Absorb
desc: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP.

name: Absorb2
desc: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP. Excess healing is converted into [img:shield].

name: Mana Meld
desc: Give all of your mana to a unit in range 3.

name: ManaMeld2
desc: Give all of your mana plus 2 to a unit.

name: Inspire
desc: Give 2 mana to a unit.

name: Inspire2
desc: Give 4 mana to a unit.

name: Telefrag
desc: Teleport onto a unit, dealing damage to yourself and that unit.

name: Telefrag2
desc: Teleport onto a unit, dealing damage to that unit.

name: Chaos Teleport
desc: Teleport to a random tile.

name: ChaosTeleport2
desc: Teleport to a random tile. Deal damage to units adjacent to the tile you teleport to.

name: Cryo-Heal
desc: Heal and inflict Freeze 1 on a unit in range 3.

name: CryoHeal2
desc:
Heal and inflict Freeze 1 on any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Gust
desc: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 1 space.

name: Gust2
desc: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 3 spaces, at infinite range.

name: Blizzard
desc: Deal ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 1 that inflicts Slow and has a 15% chance to freeze.

name: Blizzard2
desc: Deal more ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 10 that inflicts Slow and has a 25% chance to freeze.

name: Inferno
desc: Deal fire damage and inflict Burn 3 to all units in a large circle around you.

name: Inferno2
desc: Deal more fire damage and inflict Burn 5 to all units in a large circle around you.

name: Thunderburst
desc: Shoot lightning bolts in eight directions with a 15% chance to Stun.

name: Thunderburst2
desc: Shoot stronger lightning bolts in eight directions with a 25% chance to Stun.

name: Deal with the Devil
desc:
Injure yourself, then restore 15 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Deal with the Devil
desc:
Injure yourself, then restore all your mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Forbidden Flame
desc:
Damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: ForbiddenFlame2
desc:
Heavily damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Forbidden Flood
desc:
Knock back and damage all enemies, then flood the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: ForbiddenFlood2
desc:
Knock back and damage all enemies, heal all allies, then flood the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: WaterSphere2
desc: Create a larger whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

name: Whirlpool
desc: Create a whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

name: WaterSphere2
desc: Create a larger whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

name: Chain Lightning
desc: Shoot lightning that chains randomly to other nearby units up to 2 tiles away.

name: ChainLightning2
desc: Shoot lightning that chains randomly to other nearby enemies up to 3 tiles away.

name: Shatter
desc: A melee attack that instantly kills frozen units. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

name: Shatter
desc: A spell that instantly kills frozen units in an area. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

name: Forbidden Fulmination
desc:
Strike all enemies with lightning, inflicting Stun. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: ForbiddenFulmination2
desc:
Strike all enemies with lightning, inflicting Stun 2. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Firebolt
desc: Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 1 and has a 15% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.

name: FireBolt2
desc: Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 2 and has a 30% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.

name: Icicle Zapper
desc: Shoot an ice/electric bolt in a straight line. It inflicts Slow 2, has a 25% chance to Stun and a 25% chance to Freeze.

name: IcicleTaser2
desc: Shoot 2 ice/electric bolts in a straight line. They inflict Slow 2, have a 25% chance to Stun and a 25% chance to Freeze.

name: Freezer Burn
desc: Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 2, Slow 2 and Knockback 2 on all units around you.

name: FreezerBurn2
desc: Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 3, Slow 3 and Knockback 3 on all units around you in a larger area.

name: Corrupt
desc: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage.

name: Corrupt2
desc: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage and emit a Sparkle.

name: Jolt
desc: Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 1 damage and knocks the unit it hits 3 tiles in the direction it's facing.

name: Jolt2
desc: Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 2 damage and knocks the unit it hits 6 tiles in the direction it's facing.

name: Smolder
desc: Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to a unit in range.

name: Smolder2
desc:
Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Fire Surge
desc: A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn.

name: FireSurge2
desc: A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn. Starts stronger.

name: Ice Surge
desc:
An ice spell that increases its range and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.
[s:.7](Current turns: {v0})[/s]

name: IceSurge2
desc:
An ice spell that increases its range, damage, and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.
[s:.7](Current turns: {v0})[/s]

name: Lightning Surge
desc: An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 2 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.

name: LightningSurge2
desc: An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 3 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.

name: Crescendo
desc:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell resets after you cast it.

name: Creshendo2
desc:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell loses half its boosts after you cast it.

name: Divide
desc:
Lose Damage equal to half of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

name: Divide2
desc:
Lose Damage equal to 1/3rd of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

name: Forbidden Frost
desc:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 5 Damage to enemies and heal each ally 5 HP.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: ForbiddenFrost2
desc:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 10 Damage to enemies and fully heal each ally.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Black Magic
desc:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Black Magic
desc:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost and gain All Stats Up 2.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Teach
desc: Reduce the cost of another unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn.

name: Teach2
desc: Reduce the cost of a unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn. This can target yourself.

name: Homing Blasts
desc: Shoot 3 Magic Missiles at random enemies.

name: HomingBlasts2
desc: Shoot 4 Magic Missiles at random enemies.

name: Replicate
desc: The next spell you cast is cast twice.

name: Replicate
desc: The next spell you or another unit casts is cast twice.

name: Magnify
desc: Your basic attack gains +1 range and area until the end of the turn.

name: Magnify2
desc:
Your basic attack gains +2 range and +1 area until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Tri-Attack
desc: A Fire / Ice / Electric spell that inflicts Burn 1, Slow 1, and has a 5% chance to inflict Stun.

name: TriAttack2
desc: A Fire / Ice / Electric spell that inflicts Burn 1, Slow 1, and has a 5% chance to inflict Stun in an area.
